title: Upon Irene.
content:
Angry if Irene be
    But a minute's life with me:
    Such a fire I espy
    Walking in and out her eye,
    As at once I freeze and fry.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Irene."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
